case_title: TERRY DAVIS VS. CONTRA COSTA HEATING AND AIR

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-03-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTIONTO APR-15-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-28-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TERRY DAVIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONTRA COSTA HEATING AND AIR IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MR. ANTHONY WEHBE, CEO. DEFENDANT MR. ANTHONY WEHBE IS PRESENT AND NOT SERVED SEPRATELY AND NOT ASSIGNED AS A DEFENDANT SEPARATELY. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A $465 PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY-28-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT ANTHONY WEHBE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
